name: zinput_keyboard_wait_for_any_key_press
description: zInput::Keyboard_WaitForAnyKeyPress reads one buffered keyboard event, updates transition/modifier state, handles input-lost acquisition, and returns the first pressed key code.
known_limits: No dedicated VC COFF byte target exists yet for this keyboard provider helper; the smoke covers the caller-visible DirectInput event handling and input-lost paths.
Source dependencies are accepted as limited because exact DirectInput provider vtable call shape and keyboard table initialization remain zInput class-pass debt.
